Off Calendar Jan-19-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Dollar Tree Stores, Inc.
Off Calendar Jan-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH's Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Dollar Tree Stores, Inc.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Center for Environmental Health's unopposed Proposition 65 "motion for court approval and entry of consent judgment as to Dollar Tree Stores, Inc." is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
